title: Cardinal invariants of idealized Miller null sets
author_string: Aleksander Cieślak, Takehiko Gappo, Arturo Martínez-Celis, Takashi Yamazoe
abstract: This paper provides an extensive study of the $\mathscr{I}$-Miller null ideals $M_\mathscr{I}$, $σ$-ideals on the Baire space parametrized by ideals $\mathscr{I}$ on countable sets. These $σ$-ideals are associated to the idealized versions of Miller forcing in the same way that the meager ideal is associated to Cohen forcing. We compute the cardinal invariants of $M_\mathscr{I}$ for typical examples of Borel ideals $\mathscr{I}$ and show that Cichoń's Maximum can be extended by adding the uniformity and covering numbers of $M_\mathscr{I}$ for different ideals $\mathscr{I}$.
